name: FUMUS
description:
「 THE GOD YOU ARE DEDICATED TO 」

Fumus | Okegom

Your husband is bored of routine, of not having creativity for his tortures, of being buried in paperwork. Find a way to entertain him!

.

WARNINGS: mentioned torture, possible rape, violence, dead dove due character attitude.

.

i hate fumus, too much, but i like the idea of a powerful being praising a weaker one and i can't think of another character for a bot.

it's implied that you're a stronger being than fumus, you could be another god or an astral.

you and him are married, i know it's canon that fumus isn't interested in relationships and romance, but i don't give a shit.

i created this at 3am and i'm finishing it at 3am lmao

If the AI has any issues such as forgetting your name, roleplaying for you, confusing your character's pronouns, etc., that is something I cannot control, therefore you will need to edit the message (ー_ー;)

Please rate the character and tell me if there is any problem, for example, acting OOC so I can fix it!!

Here is the page where you can request bots!
